items.title: Cells & Kernels
items.description: Magics like %whos and %pip act on the kernel and its environment that run your cells.

items.title: pip & requirements.txt
items.description: %pip install is the notebook-safe way to add the packages you'd otherwise list in requirements.txt.

items.title: Notebook Best Practices
items.description: Knowing the shortcuts and the right magics underpins clean, efficient notebook habits.
